  have hsub : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by

    simp only [IsMatching.restrict₂, loopRemove, restrict, E, Set.mem_inter_iff,

    · left; exact ⟨h, h_inc⟩
    · right; exact ⟨h, h_inc⟩
  refine (encard_le_encard hsub).trans ((encard_union_le _ _).trans ?_)
  trans (1 : ℕ∞) + 1
  · exact add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
  · rfl

rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v _
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  calc
    _ ≤ (E(G ↾ (M ∆ M'), v)).encard := encard_le_encard (by
      intro e he
      simp [IsMatching.restrict₂] at he
      exact he.1)
    _ ≤ ((M ∪ M') ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_le_encard (by
      rintro e ⟨w, hw⟩
      exact ⟨symmDiff_subset_union _ _ hw.1, w, hw.2⟩)
    _ = ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := by rw [union_inter_distrib_right]
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
    _ = 2 := rfl
